name: icse-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE): venue fit, HotCRP submission audits, the Accept/Major-Revision/Reject decision model, author response, camera-ready, artifact evaluation and ACM badges, open-science and verifiability evidence, empirical rigor, related work, and cycle management. Grounded in the official ICSE 2027 Research Track call, important-dates page, artifact-evaluation track, and ICSE 2026 records, checked on 2026-07-08.
